product_information.product_name: Gloria Vanderbilt eau de toilette 100 ML
product_information.description: Een bloemige geur met noten van o.a. lavendel, ananas, jasmijn, roos, muskus, kaneel, vanille, iriswortel.

inferred_information.raw_ingredients:
alcohol denat, aqua / water,
parfum / fragrance, alpha-isomethyl ionone,
tris (tetramethylhydroxypiperidinol) citrate,
diethylamino hydroxybenzoyl hexyl benzoate,
ethylhexyl methoxycinnamate, bht, ci 14700 /
red 4, ci 19140 /yellow 5, ci 61570 green 5,
linalool, geraniol, eugenol, isoeugenol, amyl
cinnamyl alcohol, limonene, citral, citronellol,
benzyl alcohol, benzyl benzoate, benzyl
salicylate. (f.i.l. : B185117/1 ).
